query: We're building a new AI chatbot feature that processes user-submitted text and calls our internal APIs based on the content.
expected_behavior: Identifies prompt injection as the primary attack vector for this architecture
Applies the 6-Layer Security Ensemble: Input Classifiers, Canary Tokens, Output Parsers, Semantic Filtering, ML Judges, Sandboxing
Flags that relying on a single system prompt is insufficient defense for agentic systems
Recommends sandboxing the AI's ability to call internal APIs (allowlist of permitted actions)
Produces a STRIDE analysis for the AI component specifically, not just the surrounding infrastructure
